zh.lifeSummary: 當Isolda Iseult Dol於大約1140年出生在法國布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼時，她的父親Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol27歲，母親Basilia31歲。她於大約1164年與Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol在英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 辛特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1197年在法國巴-諾門迪奧內索利-拉-特拉培享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isolda Iseult Dol于大约1140年出生在法国布列塔尼易爾-吉維拉多爾-德-布利塔尼时，她的父亲Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol27岁，母亲Basilia31岁。她于大约1164年与Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol在英国英格兰可瓦爾聖 辛特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1197年在法国巴-諾門迪奧內索利-拉-特拉培享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Dol
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Manjinder, Tarsem, Ajit, Anoop, Anup, Balwinder, Hardip, Jagroop, Navdeep, Sukhpal.
Indian (Punjab): Sikh name based on the name of a Jat clan, of unexplained etymology.

nameMeanings.name: Isolda
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The name of the tragic mistress of Tristan in the Arthurian romances. There are several versions of the story. The main features are that the beautiful Isolde, an Irish princess, is betrothed to the aged King Mark of Cornwall. However, through accidentally drinking a magic potion, she and the young Cornish knight Tristan fall in love, with tragic consequences. The story has exercised a powerful hold on the European imagination. The name was relatively common in Britain in the Middle Ages, but is much rarer today.

nameMeanings.name: Iseult
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of   Isolde  , also occasionally used in the English-speaking world.

en.lifeSummary: When Isolda Iseult Dol was born about 1140, in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Brittany, France, her father, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, was 27 and her mother, Basilia, was 31. She married Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol about 1164, in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died in 1197, in Soligny-la-Trappe, Orne, Lower Normandy, France, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isolda Iseult Dol est née environ 1140, à Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, France, son père, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Basilia, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol environ 1164, à St Neot, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée en 1197, à Soligny-la-Trappe, Orne, Basse-Normandie, France, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Isolda Iseult Dol um 1140 in Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol 27 und ihre Mutter Basilia 31. Sie hat um 1164 in St Neot, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb 1197 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Soligny-la-Trappe, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Isolda Iseult Dol è nata il circa 1140 nel Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, sua padre, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Basilia, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol circa 1164, nel St Neot, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì nel 1197, nel Soligny-la-Trappe, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Isolda Iseult Dolが約1140年にフランスブレタグンイレ-エト-ヴィレアインドル-デ-ブレタグンで生まれた時，父Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dolは27歳，母Basiliaは31歳であった。約1164年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルスト ネオトでHasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dolと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1197年にフランスバセ-ノーマンディオルンソリグニー-ラ-トラップで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isolda Iseult Dol(이)가 대략 1140년 프랑스 브레타그니 이레-트-빌레이인 도-데-브레타그니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Basilia(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1164년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 니오트에서 Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1197년 프랑스 배세-노먼디 른 솔익니-라-트랩에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isolda Iseult Dol nasceu aproximadamente 1140, em Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Basilia, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol aproximadamente 1164, em St Neot, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1197, em Soligny-la-Trappe, Orne, Basse-Normandie, França, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isolda Iseult Dol родилась около 1140 г. в местности дол-де-бретагн, илле-ет-вилеин, бретагн, Франция, её отцу по имени Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Basilia, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol около 1164 г. в местности ст неот, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла в 1197 г. в местности солигни-ла-трапп, орн, бассе-норманди, Франция в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Isolda Iseult Dol nació aproximadamente 1140, en Dol-de-Bretagne, Ille-et-Vilaine, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Jean II de Dol, Seigneur de Dol, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Basilia, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Hasculf II de Soligny, Seigneur de Dol aproximadamente 1164, en St Neot, Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió en 1197, en Soligny-la-Trappe, Orne, Basse-Normandie, Francia, a la edad de 58 años.
